title: Preparation of Tissue Sections for Proteomic Analysis
author: Jamie Allen
materials: Samples are now ready to for LCMS analysis.

steps.title: Place tubes in dry ice for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Place tubes in dry ice for 00:05:00

steps.title: Defrost tubes on wet ice for...
steps.instruction: Defrost tubes on wet ice for 00:05:00 and then vortex briefly.

steps.title: Add ice to water in the...
steps.instruction: Add ice to water in the sonicator to make an icy slurry.

steps.title: Sonicate samples in ice bath for 00:10:00 and vortex
steps.instruction: Sonicate samples in ice bath for 00:10:00 and vortex.

steps.title: Spin tubes in microcentrifuge for 00:05:00 at 14000 rpm
steps.instruction: Spin tubes in microcentrifuge for 00:05:00 at 14000 rpm.

steps.title: Pipet supernatant into new labeled Eppendorf tube
steps.instruction: Pipet supernatant into new labeled Eppendorf tube. Discard pelleted tissue.

steps.title: Determine protein concentration of samples via...
steps.instruction: Determine protein concentration of samples via Pierce BCA Protein Assay kit: Prepare BSA standard curve with lysis buffer following BCA kit instructions. Pipette 25 µL of standards into the “curve” wells in a clear flat bottom plate. Pipette 20 µL of lysis buffer into the sample wells. Pipette 5 µL of sample into each sample well and mix 5x. Prepare working reagent as instructed in BCA protocol. Add 200 µL working reagent to each curve/sample well. Incubate samples for 00:30:00 at 37 °C . Add template to Softmax Pro during 00:30:00 incubation, with 5x dilution for samples. Read plate at an absorbance of 562 nm. Export results into BCA excel workbook to determine volume for 100ug of protein for the precipitation.

steps.title: Add 100 µg of protein sample to a 1
steps.instruction: Add 100 µg of protein sample to a 1.5mL labeled eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add lysis buffer to the sample to equal 100 µL
steps.instruction: Add lysis buffer to the sample to equal 100 µL .

steps.title: Add 300 µL ice cold 75:25 acetone:methanol to the sample
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL ice cold 75:25 acetone:methanol to the sample.

steps.title: Vortex sample and incubate for 02:00:00 at -80 °C
steps.instruction: Vortex sample and incubate for 02:00:00 at -80 °C . Alternatively, incubate overnight at -20 °C . Place tube rotor in cold centrifuge at 4 °C .

steps.title: Remove tubes from freezer and centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from freezer and centrifuge samples for 00:15:00 at 4000 RPM. When removing from centrifuge, place on ice or cold block to prevent pellet from dislodging.

steps.title: Add 300 µL of ice cold...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of ice cold acetone to all samples and spin for 00:15:00 at 4000 RPM.

steps.title: Remove and discard supernatent
steps.instruction: Remove and discard supernatent. Briefly allow residual acetone to evaporate from the tubes at room temperature. The drying should only be as long as it takes to get TFE and Tris ready to add. Do not over-dry the pellet, or it may not dissolve properly.

steps.title: Prepare 0.5M IAA
steps.instruction: Prepare 0.5M IAA: Dilute 1 vial of pre-weighed IAA with 100 µL of Rapid Trypsin Digestion Buffer. Keep IAA in a drawer (light sensitive).

steps.title: Resuspend the 100 µg pellet in...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the 100 µg pellet in 10 µL of neat TFE and 10 µL of 100mM Tris (pH 8.0). Vortex to dissolve pellet.

steps.title: Prepare Promega Rapid Trypsin
steps.instruction: Prepare Promega Rapid Trypsin: Add 100 µL of Promega Resuspension Buffer to 1 bottle of rapid trypsin.

steps.title: Add 4 µL prepared 1ug/ul Rapid...
steps.instruction: Add 4 µL prepared 1ug/ul Rapid Trypsin to each sample (1:25 enzyme:protein).

steps.title: Gently vortex each sample
steps.instruction: Gently vortex each sample. Incubate plate at 55 °C for 00:45:00 .

steps.title: Remove samples from incubator and pulse...
steps.instruction: Remove samples from incubator and pulse in centrifuge to to push any condensation out of the cap.

steps.title: Add 5 µL 60% Formic Acid...
steps.instruction: Add 5 µL 60% Formic Acid to each well sample to stop the digestion.

steps.title: Place samples on ice to prepare...
steps.instruction: Place samples on ice to prepare for desalting or place them in -80 °C for future use.

steps.title: Prepare tip soaking plate by placing...
steps.instruction: Prepare tip soaking plate by placing 100 µL of 1-propanol into the wells of a 96 well plate with MTP adaptor. Only fill the wells that tips will be placed in. Prepare tip rack by only placing the amount you need for digested samples and quality control samples.

steps.title: Wash Add 20 µL of Solvent B to each tip
steps.instruction: Wash Add 20 µL of Solvent B to each tip. Place the Evotips box in a centrifuge with appropriate counter balance. Centrifuge at 700g for 700 x g, °C, for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Condition Place Evotip adaptor rack on...
steps.instruction: Condition Place Evotip adaptor rack on top of the MTP plate with 1-propanol. Soak for 00:01:00 . Inspect the tips to make sure that all tips are pale white. If not, soak longer.

steps.title: Equilibrate Add 20 µL of Solvent A to each tip
steps.instruction: Equilibrate Add 20 µL of Solvent A to each tip. Place the Evotips box in a centrifuge with appropriate counter balance. Centrifuge at 700g for 700 x g, °C, for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Sample Load Add of sample or...
steps.instruction: Sample Load Add of sample or control to each tip, for a total of 20 µL . For samples, add 500ng of digested sample. For controls, add 100ng of HeLa digest. Place the Evotips box in a centrifuge with appropriate counter balance. Centrifuge at 700g for 700 x g, °C, for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Reduce samples with 1 µL premade TCEP (0
steps.instruction: Reduce samples with 1 µL premade TCEP (0.5M) at room temperature for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Alkylate samples with by adding 2 µL of 0
steps.instruction: Alkylate samples with by adding 2 µL of 0.5M IAA to each sample. Incubate in a dark drawer at room temperature for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Add 73 µL of Rapid Trypsin Buffer to each sample
steps.instruction: Add 73 µL of Rapid Trypsin Buffer to each sample.

steps.title: Wash Add 20 µL of Solvent A to each tip
steps.instruction: Wash Add 20 µL of Solvent A to each tip. Place the Evotips box in a centrifuge with appropriate counter balance. Centrifuge at 700g for 700 x g, °C, for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Preservation Add 100 µL of Solvent A to each tip
steps.instruction: Preservation Add 100 µL of Solvent A to each tip. Place the Evotips box in a centrifuge with appropriate counter balance. Pulse the centrifuge at 700g for 700 x g, °C, for 00:00:10 . This will keep the tips wet.

steps.title: Begin with tissue cryosections in eppendorf tubes
steps.instruction: Begin with tissue cryosections in eppendorf tubes. Add 100µL-500µL lysis buffer to tissue.
